description: Cultural land ontology aligned with Section 3.2 of the paper. The ontology is diagnostic rather than encyclopedic and constrains extraction to eight typed relations that support district-level analysis.

VenueOrSite.description: Cultural venue, heritage site, park, district block, museum, memorial hall, religious site, or other cultural land unit used as the main diagnostic anchor.

District.description: Administrative district used as the unit of diagnosis.

Institution.description: Government bureau, management committee, venue operator, or other institution responsible for management.

Service.description: Cultural service, program item, or capacity descriptor used in diagnosis, such as exhibition, performance, education, community activity, seating scale, collection size, or usable service area.

Award.description: Formal recognition, grade, ranking, or award used as a quality signal.

Organization.description: External organization, university, enterprise, NGO, or cultural partner linked through collaboration.

DemographicGroup.description: Target or served population such as children, older adults, tourists, residents, students, or community groups.

PolicyDocument.description: Policy, plan, regulation, approval document, or planning text that constrains or governs cultural land.

head: VenueOrSite
locatedIn.description: Assigns a cultural venue or site to the administrative district being diagnosed.
locatedIn.diagnostic_meaning: District anchor relation for district graph construction.

head: VenueOrSite
managedBy.description: Captures the institutional support structure behind cultural operation.

head: VenueOrSite
providesService.description: Represents cultural service breadth, such as exhibition, performance, education, or community programming.

head: VenueOrSite
hasCapacity.description: Encodes the service carrying capacity of a venue.

head: VenueOrSite
receivedAward.description: Represents quality signals derived from formal recognition or ranking.

head: VenueOrSite
partnersWith.description: Encodes collaborative depth and institutional connectivity.

head: VenueOrSite
servesDemographic.description: Connects cultural provision to target populations and public accessibility.

head: District
VenueOrSite
regulatedBy.description: Links a district or venue to planning and governance constraints.
